workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/_bmad/core/tasks/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
Communicate all responses in {communication_language} and language MUST be tailored to {user_skill_level}
This workflow merges a REVIEWED story branch into the TARGET branch (wave branch or main)
NEVER merge without green CI - this is non-negotiable
NEVER merge a story that is not in "done" or "review" status

step.goal: Discover story and determine target branch
step.action: Check current git branch: git branch --show-current
Extract story_key from branch name (remove feat/ or story/ prefix)

check.ask: Which story branch should I merge? Provide the branch name or story key:

step.action: Read story file and verify Status is "done" or "review"

check.if: story status is not done or review
check.ask: Story has not been reviewed. Continue anyway? [y/N]

check.if: BASE_BRANCH is set and not empty

check.action: Get PR info: gh pr view --json baseRefName -q '.baseRefName' 2>/dev/null

check.output: No PR found, defaulting target to: main

step.goal: Verify CI is green and PR exists
step.critical: CI MUST be green before any merge attempt
step.action: Check for existing PR: gh pr list --head {{story_branch}} --json number,state -q '.[0]'

check.action: Push branch if needed: git push -u origin {{story_branch}}
Verify PR base matches {{target_branch}}: gh pr view {{pr_number}} --json baseRefName -q '.baseRefName'

check.output: ⚠️ PR base ({{pr_base}}) differs from expected target ({{target_branch}})
check.action: Update PR base: gh pr edit {{pr_number}} --base {{target_branch}}

step.action: Check CI status: gh pr checks {{pr_number}}

check.output: ⏳ Waiting for CI checks to complete...
check.action: Wait for CI: gh pr checks {{pr_number}} --watch
Show failure details: gh pr checks {{pr_number}}
HALT: "CI must be green before merge. Fix failures and re-run this workflow."

step.goal: Rebase onto target branch and resolve conflicts
step.action: Fetch latest target: git fetch origin {{target_branch}}
Check if branch is up to date: git merge-base --is-ancestor origin/{{target_branch}} HEAD

check.output: ✅ Branch is up to date with {{target_branch}}

check.if: branch is NOT up to date (rebase needed)

check.action: For each conflicting file: 1. Read both versions 2. Resolve preserving both: story implementation + target changes 3. git add {resolved_file}

action.action: HALT: "Complex merge conflict — manual resolution needed. Files: {conflict_list}"

check.action: Force push rebased branch: git push --force-with-lease origin {{story_branch}}
Wait for CI: gh pr checks {{pr_number}} --watch
HALT: "CI failing after rebase — manual fix needed"

step.critical: Final check before merge: CI must be green
step.action: Final CI check: gh pr checks {{pr_number}}
HALT: "CI is not green — cannot merge"

check.action: Switch to target: git checkout {{target_branch}} && git pull origin {{target_branch}}

action.output: ⚠️ Merge blocked by branch protection. Check required approvals and CI checks.
action.action: HALT: "Merge blocked — check branch protection rules"

check.action: Save file preserving ALL comments and structure

step.action: Add Change Log entry: "Merged to {{target_branch}} via PR #{{pr_number}} ({{date}})"
step.output:
**🎉 Story {{story_key}} merged!**
**PR:** #{{pr_number}} (squash merged) **Target:** {{target_branch}} **Branch:** {{story_branch}} (deleted) **Status:** done
**Next steps:** - Run `/bmad-bmm-sprint-status` to see progress - Run `/bmad-bmm-dev-story` for the next story - Run `/bmad-bmm-retrospective` if this completes an epic
